title: Surgeon Vacancy at Aster DM Healthcare - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Aster DM Healthcare - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Aster DM Healthcare has an exciting opening for a Surgeon at our Mysuru office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Aster DM Healthcare:
Aster DM Healthcare is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Telemedicine

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Aster DM Healthcare!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
